integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely modified the records through the application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with edit forms, bulk edit screens, or deletion confirmation prompts, rather than just inspecting elements or editing HTML.
